headline: A Look At Brown & Brown (BRO) Valuation After A Year Of Weak Shareholder Returns
summary: Brown & Brown (BRO) has drawn fresh attention after a period of weaker share performance, with the stock showing a 13.6% decline year to date and a 44.2% decline over the past year. See our latest analysis for Brown & Brown. Recent trading has been weak, with a 16.2% 90 day share price decline and a 44.2% 1 year total shareholder return decline. This contrasts with positive total shareholder returns over the past three and five years and suggests longer term momentum has not entirely...
